children.label: A
children.text: the amount and disposition of project undertakings in connection with which assistance under this chapter is given or used; and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount and nature of the portion of the cost of the project or undertaking that is supplied by other sources; and
such other records as will facilitate an effective audit.

children.heading: .—Access
children.label: b .—Access
children.text: The Secretary and the Comptroller General shall have access for the purpose of audit and examination to any records of the recipient that are pertinent to assistance received under this chapter.
